name: b2b-ecommerce-platform
description: Advanced B2B E-Commerce Platform with Microservices Architecture

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace=frontend/admin-dashboard" "npm run dev --workspace=frontend/customer-portal" "npm run dev --workspace=services/api-gateway" "npm run dev --workspace=services/user-service" "npm run dev --workspace=services/product-service" "npm run dev --workspace=services/banners-service" "npm run dev --workspace=services/categories-service" "npm run dev --workspace=services/hero-slides-service" "npm run dev --workspace=services/special-offers-service" "npm run dev --workspace=services/news-blog-posts-service" "npm run dev --workspace=services/partners-service" "npm run dev --workspace=services/services-service"
scripts.dev:current: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace=frontend/admin-dashboard" "npm run dev --workspace=frontend/customer-portal" "npm run dev --workspace=services/api-gateway" "npm run dev --workspace=services/user-service" "npm run dev --workspace=services/identity-service"
scripts.dev:backend: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace=services/api-gateway" "npm run dev --workspace=services/user-service" "npm run dev --workspace=services/product-service" "npm run dev --workspace=services/banners-service" "npm run dev --workspace=services/categories-service" "npm run dev --workspace=services/hero-slides-service" "npm run dev --workspace=services/special-offers-service" "npm run dev --workspace=services/news-blog-posts-service" "npm run dev --workspace=services/partners-service" "npm run dev --workspace=services/services-service"
scripts.start: echo 'Use npm run start:services and npm run start:frontend'
scripts.start:services: concurrently "npm run start --workspace=services/api-gateway" "npm run start --workspace=services/identity-service" "npm run start --workspace=services/user-service"
scripts.start:frontend: concurrently "PORT=3005 npm run start --workspace=frontend/customer-portal" "npm run start --workspace=frontend/admin-dashboard"
scripts.build:services: npm run build --workspace=services/api-gateway && npm run build --workspace=services/identity-service && npm run build --workspace=services/user-service
scripts.build:frontend: npm run build --workspace=frontend/customer-portal && npm run build --workspace=frontend/admin-dashboard
